evidence.observation: Pytest collected 16 tests and all 16 passed in 1.48s, including the automatic analysis save-failure regression and the related app-level import/create regressions.
Pytest selected the reopened-analysis alias-handling regression and it passed, confirming merged aliases are treated as handled entities.
Pytest selected 2 focused script-analysis regressions and both passed, covering explicit save-failure feedback and alias-aware direct-fact resolution.

assertionResults.reason: tests/test_scripts.py::test_run_script_analysis_surfaces_save_failure_without_showing_results passed, proving the UI shows explicit failure feedback and skips the saved-success flow when analysis persistence fails.
tests/test_matrix.py::test_check_pending_entities_treats_aliases_as_handled passed, proving reopened analysis results do not treat merged aliases as unresolved entities.
tests/test_scripts.py::TestCreateDeductionsFromFacts::test_resolves_character_and_location_aliases passed, proving direct facts resolve canonical names and aliases to the existing entities.
